CustomField.description: Sprint 13 - Affichage du NPS de l'intervention sous forme de pictogramme.
CustomField.formula: IF(MT_NPS__c >= 8, IMAGE("/resource/Pictogramme/happy_smiley.png", TEXT(MT_NPS__c)), IF(MT_NPS__c >= 6, IMAGE("/resource/Pictogramme/neutral_smiley.png", TEXT(MT_NPS__c)), IF(MT_NPS__c > 0, IMAGE("/resource/Pictogramme/mad_smiley.png", TEXT(MT_NPS__c)), IMAGE("/resource/Pictogramme/Smiley_no_mouth.png","aucun NPS"))))
CustomField.label: Note NPS
